items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a full-page cache extension, which can lead to remote code execution via a crafted cookie.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: Adobe released a security update addressing multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, and service disruption.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API, named PolyShell, that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: Adobe released a critical security update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, resolving multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized code.

items.title: SessionReaper, unauthenticated RCE in Magento & Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This critical vulnerability, named 'SessionReaper' by Sansec, allows customer account takeover and unauthenticated remote code execution under certain conditions, with automated attacks observed in the wild.
